Agentic Frameworks.Name: OpenClaw

Agentic Frameworks.Security: High - Incorporates robust authentication and data encryption protocols.

Agentic Frameworks.Name: AutoGPT
Agentic Frameworks.Ease_of_Implementation: Moderate - Needs setup of Python environment and API keys.

Agentic Frameworks.Security: Medium - Depends on user setup, basic token security implemented.

Agentic Frameworks.Name: AgentGPT

Agentic Frameworks.Security: Medium - Standard web security measures; sensitive data should be handled carefully.

Agentic Frameworks.Name: BabyAGI

Agentic Frameworks.Ease_of_Use: Medium - Mainly code-based with limited UI.
Agentic Frameworks.Security: Low to Medium - Basic security practices; largely depends on user deployment environment.

Task2.Outline: To get a list of the senders and subject lines for all emails in your Fastmail Inbox, you can use the Fastmail JMAP API as follows: 1) Authenticate with Fastmail API using OAuth or app password. 2) Use the JMAP method 'Email/query' to retrieve the list of email IDs from the Inbox. 3) Use 'Email/get' with those IDs requesting properties 'from' and 'subject'. Since there are 5000 emails, paginate the requests to avoid timeouts and rate limits. 4) Extract and compile the list of sender email addresses and subject lines from the response data.

Task3.Report: I do not have access to personal data about your computers or digital devices unless you provide that information explicitly. Therefore, I cannot list or specify any devices or their specifications associated with you.
